Broker.Biography: Garrett Schwartz is project manager for the IYBA Vessel Portal, a PaaS platform designed to assist IYBA members in both managing and marketing their listing data. A graduate of Arizona State University, Garrett was a Regional Sales Manager for a leading sales automation firm for over 10 years before establishing a tech firm that specialized in real estate MLS and marine industry API data integration services. Garrett with wife Maria and son Max split their time between Naples Florida and Sedona Arizona.
Broker.Headline: Over 30 Years Marine Industry Experience
Broker.Testimonial: “We wish all brokers took the time you did to talk to us to find out just what we wanted in a boat and then took the time and effort to find it. Your guidance, expert knowledge of boats, and exceptional negotiating skills throughout the process were essential to making everything work as well as it did. We encourage all other customers to listen closely to your sound advice and expertise in boats. You are a true professional. You can be sure that if anyone we know is in the market for a boat, we will definitely send them to you. Again, thanks so much!”
